# turbodismount2.com

> Unofficial fan wiki and guide site for Turbo Dismount 2 — a comedy physics racing sandbox game by Secret Exit Ltd.

## Pages

- [Home](https://turbodismount2.com/): Wiki homepage with game overview, stats, and quick links
- [How to Play](https://turbodismount2.com/guides/how-to-play/): Complete beginner's guide — controls, game modes, scoring
- [Tips & Tricks](https://turbodismount2.com/guides/tips/): 15 pro strategies for higher scores
- [Vehicle Database](https://turbodismount2.com/database/vehicles/): All vehicles with speed, handling, durability ratings
- [Level Guide](https://turbodismount2.com/database/levels/): Every level walkthrough with high score tips
- [Workshop](https://turbodismount2.com/workshop/): Best community mods, maps, and custom levels
- [News & Updates](https://turbodismount2.com/news/): Patch notes, roadmap, development timeline
- [Download](https://turbodismount2.com/download/): How to buy on Steam, system requirements
- [Play Online](https://turbodismount2.com/play-online/): Free browser version of original Turbo Dismount
- [FAQ](https://turbodismount2.com/faq/): 25+ common questions answered
- [System Requirements](https://turbodismount2.com/system-requirements/): PC specs checker
- [Mobile](https://turbodismount2.com/mobile/): iOS/Android release date tracking
- [Games Like TD2](https://turbodismount2.com/vs/games-like/): 12+ physics destruction alternatives compared
